texto: Poor friend and learned physician, my sensitive and gentle companion, instead of treating and curing the sick you yourself have fallen beneath the yoke of death, and now belong to death's kingdom. For many months you have witnessed such suffering and horror as the human mind can scarcely conceive, as he who sees cannot believe. Perhaps it is for the best that your nerves have betrayed you, that a benevolent veil of forgetfulness has fallen upon your mind. Now, at least, you need not fret or worry about what the future may hold in store for you.
explicacao: Citação de Miklós Nyiszli sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Poor friend and learned physician, my sensitive and gentle companion, instead of treating and cur…” articula amizade, depression, imminent-death em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.

texto: The pyromaniacs of the Third Reich were now playing their final scene on the stage of the world: they who had set the world aflame were now perishing in their own fires.
explicacao: Citação de Miklós Nyiszli sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The pyromaniacs of the Third Reich were now playing their final scene on the stage of the world: …” articula reflexao, nazis, third-reich em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como third-reich e war.
